style: coral-red monoline icons on white, generated as a consistent 4x4 atlas
sourceReference: user-provided custom Combat Class icon screenshot
taxonomy: Custom combat roles independent from Riot primary and secondary champion classes

signatureRules.poke-controller: Support + Poke + Ranged or Control >= 1; uses the spellbook icon
signatureRules.pick-catcher: Catch, Pick or Hook + hard crowd control; uses the spider-web icon

files: The base set is cropped from archetype-atlas-ai.png. Corrected carry and Catcher mappings are cropped from catcher-role-atlas-ai.png.
